Leadership.Chancellor: The current Rector of President University (2024-2027) is Handa S. Abidin, S.H., LL.M., Ph.D. He is an expert in International Law and officially took office on January 31, 2024.

General Information.Student Affairs: The Student Affairs Bureau manages organizations, clubs, dormitories, and scholarships. We foster student character through campus events and leadership training.
General Information.Setsail BizAccel: Setsail BizAccel is our business incubator, ranked #1 by WURI for Entrepreneurial Spirit. We mentor students to build startups from scratch with funding and lab facilities.
General Information.Adam Kurniawan Library: Adam Kurniawan Library offers an elegant study environment with an extensive international book collection and comprehensive digital e-Resources. It also provides reference services, OER, and a cozy discussion space.
General Information.Endowment Funds: The President University Endowment Fund channels donations from alumni and corporate partners into scholarships and campus facility development.
General Information.List of Faculties: President University has 7 main faculties: Business, Artificial Intelligence & Smart Manufacturing, Engineering, Social Science & Education, Law, Medicine, and Art, Design & Architecture.

About Us & Leaders.History: Established in 2001 by S.D. Darmono and Prof. Donald W. Watts, President University aims to produce global leaders with an entrepreneurial spirit. We host thousands of students from all over the world.
About Us & Leaders.IMPACT Values:
President University's core values are IMPACT: 
1. [I] International: A global academic environment with international students and alumni from 50 countries. 
2. [M] Medium of Communication in English: All learning and communication are conducted in English, ensuring global readiness. 
3. [P] Portfolio-Building Curriculum: An extensive curriculum designed to help students build a strong portfolio for future careers or graduate studies. 
4. [A] Absolutely Worth It, Value for Money: The extensive student benefits and diverse scholarship opportunities make choosing President University a worthwhile decision. 
5. [C] Culture: Creating Moments of Happiness: A vibrant campus culture that nurtures happiness, creativity, and lifelong friendships. 
6. [T] Targeted Career Preparation: A focused career development approach that prepares students with practical skills and industry-relevant experience aligned to their future professions.

Academic - Undergraduate.Accounting: The Accounting program prepares students with global standards, auditing, and modern software skills for top tier corporate careers.
Academic - Undergraduate.Business Administration: Business Administration fosters a global entrepreneurial mindset with specializations in international business, hospitality, and startups.
Academic - Undergraduate.Management: Our Management program creates cross-cultural leaders focusing on Finance, Digital Marketing, Human Capital, or International Business.
Academic - Undergraduate.Actuarial Science: Actuarial Science blends math, statistics, and data science to train future experts in risk management and insurance.
Academic - Undergraduate.Agribusiness: Agribusiness integrates modern urban farming with IoT and e-commerce to ensure future food security.
Academic - Undergraduate.Informatics: Informatics uses a Bootcamp approach to master AI, Cyber Security, Game Development, IoT, and Cloud Computing.
Academic - Undergraduate.Information Systems: Information Systems bridges IT with industrial business needs, offering Data Science training and ERP certifications.
Academic - Undergraduate.Mechanical Engineering: Mechanical Engineering focuses on smart design, manufacturing automation, and modern energy solutions.
Academic - Undergraduate.Electrical Engineering: Electrical Engineering equips students for the renewable energy, IoT, and smart-device technology industries.
Academic - Undergraduate.Industrial Engineering: Industrial Engineering trains experts in supply chain, quality control, and production optimization.
Academic - Undergraduate.Environmental Engineering: Environmental Engineering prepares students to manage industrial impacts, water quality, and Green Economy initiatives.
Academic - Undergraduate.Civil Engineering: Civil Engineering shapes job-ready infrastructure designers and contractors through real-world projects and internships.
Academic - Undergraduate.International Relations: International Relations develops global strategists excelling in diplomacy, security analytics, and multinational fluency.
Academic - Undergraduate.Communications: Communication Science focuses on Digital PR, Film & Media, and modern social media Content Creation.
Academic - Undergraduate.Elementary Teacher Education: Our Education program trains primary teachers for international schools utilizing English and global curricula like Cambridge or IB.
Academic - Undergraduate.Law: The Law program features Moot Court simulations tailored toward Corporate, International, and modern Business Litigation.
Academic - Undergraduate.Medicine: Our Faculty of Medicine uniquely emphasizes Occupational Health for industrial environments, supported by early clinical practice.
Academic - Undergraduate.Interior Design: Interior Design teaches students to sustainably design functional and aesthetic spaces for residential and commercial projects.
Academic - Undergraduate.Architecture: Architecture merges global design thinking with real-world practice through Architour events and professional site visits.
Academic - Undergraduate.Visual Communication Design: VCD combines digital arts with animation, game design, and graphic design, offering full Adobe CC access to students.

Admission & Scholarships.Admission: We offer a streamlined admission process for both local and international students. Applicants can apply online through our university portal.
Admission & Scholarships.Scholarships: President University provides various scholarships (up to 100%) based on academic merit, sports, arts achievements, and endowment funds.

Campus Life & Facilities.Dormitory: President University Student Housing (PUSH) ensures a secure, multicultural living environment for students equipped with modern amenities.
Campus Life & Facilities.Sports & Recreation: Our campus boasts comprehensive sports facilities including golf, tennis, swimming, and basketball courts via the Jababeka infrastructure.
Campus Life & Facilities.Clubs & Communities: Students can join over 30 vibrant clubs ranging from arts and tech to culture and sports, enriching their university experience.

Internship & Career.Internship & Career Center: ICC connects students with hundreds of multinational companies. Through 1-2 semester internships and campus hiring, 93% of our graduates are hired before or shortly after graduation.

International Office.Global Exchange: The International Office handles student exchange programs, dual degrees, and international partnerships, ensuring a truly global campus vibe.

Research & Grants.Research Center: Our research center facilitates student and faculty innovation through national grants, international collaborations, and applied industry research.
